task_description: Search for two sports video games, add them to the wishlist, then open the wishlist and filter it to a compact view showing discounted games only.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the Steam Store search box at the top center with the text "fc 2" currently entered and the text cursor at the end, indicating typing into the search field rather than selecting a result. A dropdown below the search box shows live search results including "EA SPORTS FC 26" at the top, followed by "{EA SPORTS FC™ 25}", "Too Many F*cking Nazis", and "Drunken FC". In the full screen, this is the Steam store homepage in Chinese, with the search field active beside a blue search button with a white magnifying glass, and the page background dimmed behind the results panel.
caption.action: Type "FC 26" into the active Steam search field, appending/replacing the current query as needed.
caption.expectation: The search text updates to the typed game name and the suggestion list refreshes, likely showing matching results for FC 26.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The screen is fully framed with no red X or drag path, indicating a keyboard action. The Steam Store search bar near the top center contains the text "fc 26" and a dark dropdown panel of search suggestions is open beneath it. The top result in the list is "EA SPORTS FC™ 26," followed by other related entries such as "《EA SPORTS FC™ 25》" and "Football Club Simulator - FCS #21." In the full-screen view, this is the Steam store homepage in Chinese, dimmed behind the search results overlay.
caption.expectation: Steam should submit the current search query and navigate from the suggestion dropdown to the search results or the matching game page for FC 26.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the first search result row labeled "EA SPORTS FC™ 26," specifically over the game title area next to the cover art thumbnail. The row is a clickable list item in the results list, not a blank area. In the full-screen view, Steam is displaying search results for "fc 26" with multiple related entries, and the first result has a hover preview panel on the right showing the same game's artwork and details.
caption.action: Click the first search result titled "EA SPORTS FC™ 26".
caption.expectation: Steam should select that result and navigate to the product page for EA SPORTS FC™ 26.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the full Steam product page with no red X or drag path, indicating a scroll action affecting the page rather than a specific control. The page is for "EA SPORTS FCTM 26" and currently shows the top section: a large black media player area on the left with a row of video and screenshot thumbnails beneath it, and on the right a promotional image of football players plus Chinese description text, review summaries, release date, developer/publisher names, and blue tag chips. The full-screen view confirms this is the Steam app page for the game, with the store navigation bar and search field at the top and a vertical scrollbar on the right, so the main product page is the scrollable region.
caption.action: Scroll down on the Steam game details page.
caption.expectation: The product page should move downward, revealing content below the top media and summary section, such as more details, purchase information, or additional sections further down.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the large light-blue button labeled “添加至您的愿望单,” which is the Add to your wishlist button below the media thumbnails on the game page. Nearby are adjacent blue buttons including “关注” and a small dropdown-style control, confirming the X is on a clickable UI control rather than a blank area. The full-screen view shows the Steam product page for EA SPORTS FC 26 in Chinese, with the game trailer area on the left, game details and tags on the right, and purchase/download panels further down the page.
caption.action: Click the light-blue “添加至您的愿望单” button.
caption.expectation: The game should be added to the Steam wishlist, and the button area should update to reflect the saved state or provide brief confirmation.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the full visible Steam product page area with no semitransparent red X or drag path, indicating a scroll action rather than a click on a specific control. The page is currently positioned around the middle-lower section of the EA SPORTS FC 26 store page: a large media panel is visible at left, game summary text and blue tag chips are on the right, a blue button labeled “查看您的队列” appears beneath the details, and lower on the page there is a wide green panel for “下载《EA SPORTS FC™ 26》SHOWCASE” with buttons including “下载” and “添加到库.” The full-screen view confirms this is the Steam store page in Chinese with the top navigation bar, search field, wishlist/cart area, and a vertical scrollbar on the right, so the main page content is the scrollable region.
caption.action: Scroll up on the Steam game details page.
caption.expectation: The page should move upward, bringing earlier content back into view, such as the upper media area, summary section, and wishlist controls higher on the product page.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the dark top-bar wishlist indicator with a white star icon and the label “愿望单 1,” positioned between the blue search button and the blue shopping cart button. This is a top-area UI control, not blank space. The full-screen image confirms the Steam store page for EA SPORTS FC 26 is open, with the game media panel and details visible below, and the target is in the global store header.
caption.action: Click the top-bar wishlist control labeled “愿望单 1” with the white star icon.
caption.expectation: The wishlist view or wishlist dropdown should open immediately, showing saved items instead of just the current game page.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on a wide horizontal blue-gray strip with no visible text, icon, button border, handle, or menu item, indicating the target is a blank region rather than a specific control. The full-screen image shows the Steam wishlist page titled “LIAOZY2 的愿望单,” with one listed item, “EA SPORTS FC™ 26,” and the clicked area is the empty background space below the wishlist content and above the footer, not on any interactive element.
caption.action: Click the empty background area of the wishlist page.
caption.expectation: Nothing substantial should open or change; at most, any hover state or incidental focus should clear while the wishlist page remains visible.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the Steam store search field in the top header with the text “nba 2” currently entered and the text caret at the end, indicating the search box is active and receiving keyboard input. Immediately beneath it, a dark autocomplete panel labeled “搜索结果” is open, listing basketball-related results including “NBA 2K26,” “《NBA 2K26》辉煌生涯第5季额外奖励,” “NBA 2K25,” and “《NBA 2K26》名人堂通行证：第5季,” each with cover art and prices. The full-screen image confirms this is the Steam wishlist page for “LIAOZY2 的愿望单,” dimmed behind the expanded search suggestions, with the top navigation bar, wishlist count, cart button, and the single wishlist item visible in the background. This is a text-entry action in the global Steam search bar, appending to the existing query rather than replacing it.
caption.action: Type “NBA 26” into the active Steam search field, appending the input to the current text entry.
caption.expectation: The search text should update in the search bar and the autocomplete results beneath it should refresh to match the new query.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the autocomplete search result row labeled “NBA 2K26,” with the game’s red-and-white cover art on the left and a green discount badge “-75%” followed by the discounted price on the right. This is a specific selectable result item in the search suggestions list, not a blank area. The full-screen image shows the Steam wishlist page in the background while the global search dropdown is open under the top search bar containing “nba 26,” and the targeted row is the highlighted “NBA 2K26” result in that dropdown.
caption.action: Click the “NBA 2K26” search result in the autocomplete dropdown.
caption.expectation: Steam should open the NBA 2K26 store page, replacing the wishlist view and closing the search suggestions.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the full Steam store page for NBA 2K26 with no red X, consistent with a scroll action. The main content area is centered on the game's hero section: a large video preview on the left with basketball thumbnails beneath it, and on the right a panel with the NBA 2K26 logo, a Chinese description, review text, release date, developer and publisher links, and blue genre tags. The full-screen view confirms this is the Steam store product page in the browser-like Steam client, with the top navigation bar and search field visible. Since the action is ScrollDown, the intended scrollable region is the main store page content.
caption.action: Scroll down on the main Steam store page to move further below the NBA 2K26 header section.
caption.expectation: The page should move downward, revealing content lower on the NBA 2K26 store page while the current hero section slides upward.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the large blue button labeled “添加至您的愿望单,” which means add to your wishlist. This is a clickable UI control in the action button row beneath the media gallery, next to smaller buttons such as follow and ignore. The full-screen view confirms this is the Steam store page for NBA 2K26, with the large preview image and thumbnails above, the game details panel on the right, and the purchase section lower on the page.
caption.action: Click the blue “添加至您的愿望单” button.
caption.expectation: The game should be added to the wishlist, and the button should immediately change state or text to indicate it is already in the wishlist.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the full Steam store page with no semitransparent red X, indicating a scroll action affecting the page rather than a specific control. The visible section is the NBA 2K26 product page: a large hero media panel on the left with the text “WELCOME TO OUR HOUSE,” a strip of video/image thumbnails below it, and a right-side details column with Chinese description text, review summary, release date, developer and publisher links, and blue tag chips. Below the media area, the wishlist state button row is visible with a checked wishlist button, plus follow and ignore buttons, and the purchase section beginning with “购买 NBA 2K26” and a green “添加至购物车” button. The full-screen image confirms this is the Steam page for NBA 2K26 and the main scrollable region is the central store page content.
caption.action: Scroll up on the main Steam store page.
caption.expectation: The page should move upward, bringing earlier content from higher on the NBA 2K26 store page back into view while the purchase section shifts downward.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the dark top-bar button with a white star icon and the label “愿望单 2,” which is the wishlist button. It sits between the blue search button with a magnifying-glass icon on the left and the blue shopping cart button labeled “购物车 1” on the right. This is a clickable top-area UI control. The full-screen image confirms the Steam store page for NBA 2K26 is open, with the product media panel and details visible below the store header.
caption.action: Click the top-bar wishlist button labeled “愿望单 2”.
caption.expectation: The wishlist view or menu should open immediately, showing the items saved in the wishlist.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on a dark rectangular button labeled “选项” with a small downward triangle, indicating a top-area UI control for options. Immediately to its right is a sorting section labeled “排序依据：”. The full-screen image shows the Steam wishlist page titled “LIAOZY2 的愿望单,” with two game entries listed below and the options and sort controls aligned above the list on the right side.
caption.action: Click the top-area “选项” dropdown button.
caption.expectation: An options menu should open directly below or near the button, showing wishlist-related settings or filters.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a dark gray options panel with a section labeled “视图” containing two radio choices: “简洁” and “详细.” A semitransparent red X is centered on “简洁,” indicating that exact radio option is the target. The full-screen image shows the Steam wishlist page for “LIAOZY2 的愿望单,” with the options/filter overlay open above the wishlist items; the currently selected view appears to be “详细,” and this click is on a UI control inside the open options panel.
caption.action: Click the “简洁” radio option under “视图”.
caption.expectation: The wishlist view setting should switch to the compact/simple layout, updating the list display while keeping or dismissing the options panel depending on Steam's behavior.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the “种类” section inside a dark gray options panel, with three unchecked square checkboxes listed vertically: “游戏,” “软件,” and “DLC.” A semitransparent red X is centered directly over the top checkbox and label “游戏,” indicating that exact filter option. The full-screen image shows the Steam wishlist page for “LIAOZY2 的愿望单,” with the options overlay open above the wishlist items; other filter groups such as view, platform, sorting, discount, Deck compatibility, and a price slider are visible.
caption.action: Click the “游戏” checkbox under the “种类” section.
caption.expectation: The “游戏” filter should become selected, and the wishlist results should update or remain filtered to game items while the options panel stays open.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the open dark gray options panel’s “折扣” section with four radio choices. A semitransparent red X is centered on the second radio option labeled “所有打折项目,” directly below the currently selected “愿望单中所有项目.” Nearby options “50% 或更高” and “75% 或更高” are visible below. The full-screen image shows the Steam wishlist page for “LIAOZY2 的愿望单,” with the options overlay still open over the wishlist and game thumbnails visible on the left side.
caption.action: Click the “所有打折项目” radio option under the “折扣” section.
caption.expectation: That discount filter should become selected, and the wishlist should update to show only discounted items while the options panel remains open.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X placed on a plain dark blue empty area directly below the open gray filter panel, not on any button, checkbox, radio option, slider, or game tile. The full-screen image shows the Steam wishlist page with a large gray filter/options overlay open in the center, containing sections for view, platform, type, discount, tags, Deck compatibility, and a price slider. The X is on the blank page background outside that overlay, indicating a click on an empty region rather than a specific control.
caption.action: Click the blank dark blue area outside the open filter panel.
caption.expectation: The empty-background click should dismiss or close the open filter/options overlay, returning focus to the wishlist page without selecting any new filter.
